sections.core: Celebration hospitality is sponsor-funded. Use the gift registry below to underwrite the evening — dinner, Santa, crafts, entertainment, and more.
sections.registry: Named gifts from our sponsorship packet — each card is a slot you can fund. Pick the story you want to own for the 10th annual celebration.
sections.tiers: Recognition levels based on your total sponsorship. Tier benefits stack with naming credit on any Fund the Fete gifts you fund.
sections.options: Presenting-level sponsorships unlock the strongest logo placement and stage recognition.
